The '''MVR-3 speeder bike''' was a military grade [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bike]] used by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. It was designed before the standards of speeder bike style had become common, and therefore looked very different from most speeder bikes. It had a large, sleek tail section that housed the repulsorlifts and turbothrust engines. It also had a storage bay in the tail. The long tail helped with stability. Military versions came with a small blaster mounted on the nose.

This speeder bike was manufactured by [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom Corporation]] while its hydrodynamic adaptor kits were developed by the [[Xi Char]] for the Trade Federation, to compensate design flaws in the [[Manta droid subfighter|''Manta'' droid subfighter]]. [[Mini-sub|An aquatic variant]] of the vehicle saw action during the [[Battle of Mon Calamari (Clone Wars)/Legends|Battle of Mon Calamari]].

The MVR-3's design, including the extended tail and curve up bow were remarkably similar to the [[Razalon/Legends|Razalon]] [[FC-20 speeder bike/Legends|FC-20 speeder bike]], made famous by [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]], and the [[Flitknot speeder/Legends|Flitknot speeder]] manufactured by [[Huppla Pasa Tisc Shipwrights Collective/Legends|Huppla Pasa Tisc Shipwrights Collective]].
